# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.
# Category: supply_chain_security

name: ci-cd

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  NODE_ENV: production
  CI: true

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies (fast)
        run: npm ci --no-audit --no-fund --prefer-offline

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Package artifact
        run: |
          tar -czf dist.tgz dist build .next out public 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: dist.tgz
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 1

  deploy:
    name: Deploy
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: .

      - name: Deploy (remote SSH)
        if: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST != '' && secrets.DEPLOY_USER != '' && secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY != '' && secrets.DEPLOY_PATH != '' }}
        uses: appleboy/scp-action@v0.1.7
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          key: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}
          source: "dist.tgz"
          target: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}

      - name: Activate release (remote SSH)
        if: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST != '' && secrets.DEPLOY_USER != '' && secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY != '' && secrets.DEPLOY_PATH != '' }}
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v1.2.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          key: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}
          script: |
            set -e
            cd "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}"
            mkdir -p current
            tar -xzf dist.tgz -C current
            rm -f dist.tgz
            if [ -n "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_RESTART_CMD }}" ]; then
              eval "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_RESTART_CMD }}"
            fi
